ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To Jun-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to attorney Kurt E. Yip to appear on June 05, 2023, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-18-2023 Continued To Mar-29-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Kurt Yip, Esq. for Amy Rockwell (Executor) also via Zoom.

The Court stated that due to the tech connectivity issue at the last call of this matter that the orders to appear are discharged.

The Court inquired about the filing of a petition for final distribution. Mr. Yip stated that he is waiting on a few more waivers and that he should be able to file a petition in the next month or two. The Court stated that today's status would be continued out far enough so that the petition for final distribution could be filed and a date set. Mr. Yip stated that they should be filing in early February.

Today's status on close of the estate is continued to March 29, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: H. Singh. Matter not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A further Order to Appear will be issued to Executor Amy Christine Rockwell and Attorney Kurt E. Yip to appear on January 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, and why a final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate, and the initial order to appear are also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Nov-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Amy C. Rockwell and Attorney Kurt E. Yip to appear on Nov-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Yip, via ZOOM, for Amy Rockwell, Petitioner.

The court begins by advising Mr. Yip that it appears to the court that a $20,000 bond is sufficient. Mr. Yip confirms the court's position. The court asks if there are any objections to this petition. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-02-2004 is admitted to probate. Amy Christine Rockwell is appointed as Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-03-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
